'''Raito''' was a [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] known for having once killed a young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. The tribe that orally recorded this event was destroyed early in [[Timeline of galactic history/Legends|galactic history]], but Raito's [[Raito's gaderffii|gaderffii]] at some point was recovered by another tribe's [[Storyteller]]. It may have later come into the possession of [[Revan/Legends|Revan]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1stm}}
